name: design-audit-ux-polish
description: Synthetic fixture for design audit prompts that need visual critique without broad redesign.
source_prompts: review this screen like a designer
fix spacing and ai slop but don't rebuild everything

golden_profile.default_intent: The user wants a designer-quality audit with concrete visual issues and scoped fixes.
golden_profile.preferred_autonomy: Inspect the actual UI surface and implement small polish only when requested.
golden_profile.evidence_standard: Use screenshots, viewport notes, component/file references, and before/after checks.
golden_profile.scope_preference: Polish the named surface; avoid a new visual system.

add_by_default: Name specific hierarchy, spacing, typography, and alignment issues.
ask_before: Changing brand direction or design system.

rough_prompt: audit this dashboard design and fix obvious visual issues
golden_rewrite: Use the visible design audit skill, such as $design-review or $polish if available, to inspect the dashboard in the real app. Lead with concrete visual findings: hierarchy, spacing, typography, alignment, density, and AI-slop patterns, with viewport or screenshot evidence where useful. Implement only obvious scoped polish fixes if code changes are requested; do not rebuild the dashboard or change the design system. Verify the final screen at desktop and mobile widths.
